requirement_topic.en: Network Interoperability, OCPP Readiness, and EMC
requirement_topic.zh: 联网互操作、OCPP就绪性及电磁兼容
requirement_topic.zht: 聯網互操作、OCPP就緒性及電磁相容

summary.en: Networked chargers in Panama public, fleet, logistics, commercial, highway, or Panama City projects may require OCPP back-office interoperability, remote metering, payment integration, access control, fault reporting, and load management. EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared against the IEC 61000 family and project-specific distributor limits. Because Panama's EV charging network is still developing, OCPP version, cybersecurity, payment, roaming, and data-hosting requirements should be confirmed with the charge-point operator, site owner, distributor, and ASEP where relevant.
summary.zh: 巴拿马公共、车队、物流、商业、公路或巴拿马城项目中的联网充电桩，可能要求OCPP后台互操作、远程计量、支付集成、访问控制、故障报告和负载管理。EMC及电能质量证据应按IEC 61000系列和项目特定配电公司限值准备。由于巴拿马充电网络仍在发展，OCPP版本、网络安全、支付、漫游和数据托管要求应向充电点运营商、场地方、配电公司及必要时ASEP确认。
summary.zht: 巴拿馬公共、車隊、物流、商業、公路或巴拿馬城項目中的聯網充電樁，可能要求OCPP後台互操作、遠程計量、支付整合、訪問控制、故障報告和負載管理。EMC及電能品質證據應按IEC 61000系列和項目特定配電公司限值準備。由於巴拿馬充電網絡仍在發展，OCPP版本、網絡安全、支付、漫遊和數據託管要求應向充電點運營商、場地方、配電公司及必要時ASEP確認。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked EV charging
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility, harmonics, flicker, and immunity
IEC 61851-24 — DC charging digital communication reference where applicable
Project-specific CPO, owner, distributor, and ASEP requirements

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 between the off-board charger and vehicle battery management system. Chinese network operators may use proprietary back-office protocols or OCPP variants, but these do not automatically satisfy a Panama CPO's platform, payment, remote monitoring, or data requirements. China EMC evidence under GB/T 17626 or GB 17625 may need to be mapped to IEC 61000 clauses and retested as required.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常在非车载充电机与车辆电池管理系统之间采用GB/T 27930-2023。中国网络运营商可能使用私有后台协议或OCPP变体，但这些并不自动满足巴拿马充电点运营商的平台、支付、远程监控或数据要求。中国按GB/T 17626或GB 17625形成的EMC证据可能需要映射至IEC 61000条款，并按要求重新测试。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常在非車載充電機與車輛電池管理系統之間採用GB/T 27930-2023。中國網絡運營商可能使用私有後台協議或OCPP變體，但這些並不自動滿足巴拿馬充電點運營商的平台、支付、遠程監控或數據要求。中國按GB/T 17626或GB 17625形成的EMC證據可能需要映射至IEC 61000條款，並按要求重新測試。

standards_or_laws: GB 17625 series — harmonic current and voltage fluctuation limits

gap.en: Exporters must confirm the OCPP version, charger-management platform, SIM or wired communications, payment integration, user authentication, cybersecurity, firmware update process, data reporting, and load-management interface before site activation. For DC products, GB/T 27930 vehicle-side communication does not substitute for CCS1 communication or OCPP back-office integration. EMC files should include conducted and radiated emissions, harmonics, flicker, surge, EFT, ESD, and immunity evidence mapped to IEC 61000 and local distributor requirements.
gap.zh: 出口商须在站点激活前确认OCPP版本、充电桩管理平台、SIM或有线通信、支付集成、用户认证、网络安全、固件更新流程、数据报告及负载管理接口。对于直流产品，GB/T 27930车侧通信不能替代CCS1通信或OCPP后台集成。EMC文件应包括传导和辐射发射、谐波、闪变、浪涌、电快速瞬变、静电放电及抗扰度证据，并映射至IEC 61000及当地配电公司要求。
gap.zht: 出口商須在站點激活前確認OCPP版本、充電樁管理平台、SIM或有線通訊、支付整合、用戶認證、網絡安全、韌體更新流程、數據報告及負載管理接口。對於直流產品，GB/T 27930車側通訊不能替代CCS1通訊或OCPP後台整合。EMC文件應包括傳導和輻射發射、諧波、閃變、浪湧、電快速瞬變、靜電放電及抗擾度證據，並映射至IEC 61000及當地配電公司要求。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific — OCPP, payment, monitoring, and EMC acceptance requirements depend on CPO, owner, distributor, and ASEP expectations; IEC 61000 evidence is a prudent baseline
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 and China EMC evidence apply domestically and do not substitute for Panama platform integration or IEC 61000 evidence without review

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Networked Panama deployments need platform and EMC confirmation, not just a charger that works in China. Confirm OCPP, payment, load management, and IEC 61000 evidence with the CPO, site owner, distributor, and ASEP before activation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴拿马联网部署需要平台和EMC确认，而不只是“在中国可用”的充电桩。站点激活前，应向充电点运营商、场地方、配电公司及ASEP确认OCPP、支付、负载管理和IEC 61000证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴拿馬聯網部署需要平台和EMC確認，而不只是「在中國可用」的充電樁。站點激活前，應向充電點運營商、場地方、配電公司及ASEP確認OCPP、支付、負載管理和IEC 61000證據。
